escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts intensify with Easter ceasefire violations in Ukraine and ongoing US naval blockade of Iran's Strait of Hormuz.

ticker_items: Russia-Ukraine Easter ceasefire collapses with 1,000+ drone attacks reported
Iran claims 3,375 killed in US-Israel war, mines remain in Hormuz
Israeli strike kills infant during funeral in south Lebanon
Trump declares victory over Iran but ceasefire talks continue
Russia launches spring offensive with 400-drone barrage on Ukraine

eastern_europe.description: Russia violated Orthodox Easter truce with nearly 470 incidents including airstrikes, drone attacks and shelling.
Easter ceasefire violations with over 1,000 drone and shelling attacks reported by both sides.

middle_east.description: Israeli strike kills infant girl during father's funeral in south Lebanon.
Iranian drone attack hits pumping station on Saudi Arabia's East-West oil pipeline.

claimed_totals.claim: US military deaths in Iran conflict
Iranian civilian casualties from US-Israeli strikes

ukraine.text: Called for a longer ceasefire after Easter truce violations
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: US navy will immediately begin a blockade to stop ships from entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: In other words, we succeeded here in crushing the nuclear program, crushing the missile program, and we also had an additional goal: To crush the regime in Iran.
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister

middle_east.text: It doesn't matter. From the standpoint of America, we win
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: President

middle_east.text: The United States' maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade derailed what was just inches away from becoming the Islamabad MoU
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Foreign Minister
middle_east.title: Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: We succeeded here in crushing the nuclear program, crushing the missile program, and we also had an additional goal: To crush the regime in Iran.
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister

middle_east.text: We are taking down the houses that have become terror outposts-just like in Gaza.
middle_east.speaker: Defense Minister Katz
middle_east.title: Defense Minister

observers.description: Hungarians vote in closely watched parliamentary elections that could end Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule. The election is being monitored by both EU and Russian observers given Hungary's strategic position.

China struck a delicate balance during the Iran conflict, declining to give full support to Iran while deepening cooperation with North Korea. NATO warns China could activate 'junior partners' to divert US attention from potential Taiwan action.

Pakistan hosted 21-hour US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad that failed to produce breakthrough. Islamabad leveraged its ties with Gulf states, US, and China to facilitate negotiations that others could not manage.
PM Starmer announces UK-France co-hosted talks this week aimed at diplomatic end to Iran war. Britain developing anti-drone systems as RAF tests laser-guided rockets on Typhoon fighters.

financial.notes: Hormuz closure threatens global food security as urea fertilizer supplies disrupted, impacting agricultural production worldwide.

update_log.text: Iran reports 3,375 killed in conflict with US and Israel as war enters second month.
Both Russia and Ukraine report over 1,000 ceasefire violations during Orthodox Easter truce.
Israeli strike kills infant during funeral in south Lebanon as regional violence continues.
UK announces diplomatic talks with France to address Strait of Hormuz crisis this week.
Russia and Ukraine accused each other of ~2,000 ceasefire violations during Orthodox Easter truce
US-Iran talks in Islamabad failed to reach agreement after 21 hours of negotiations
Iran announces reconstruction of oil facilities with goal of 80% capacity within 2 months
Trump announces immediate US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks collapse
Hungary begins voting in elections that could end Orbán's 16-year rule
Ukraine reports Russia violated Easter truce with nearly 470 incidents
Netanyahu states Israel's campaign against Iran is not over
